scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 08 Toast bottom placement/accessibility, toast lifecycle timing, NotificationPanel settlement card glass styling, and deterministic UI tests.

targetedTest.summary: 70 tests passed, including Toast bottom-nav offset, aria-live status, slideUp/reduced-motion classes, glass styling, 5 second auto-dismiss, and NotificationPanel settlement glass card styling.

lint.summary: ESLint passed for Toast and NotificationPanel changes.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed after toast store timer and UI test changes.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 230 tests passed, 15 skipped.

build.summary: Production build passed with build-time public Supabase env.

retrospective.issuesObserved: The toast store previously used a 3 second timeout and did not clear older timers, so repeated toasts could dismiss a newer message early.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual mobile visual check of the toast floating above BottomNav was not run; deterministic class and timer tests cover the contract.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider a reusable Toast behavior test fixture so future notification changes do not need to live in the large frontend-auth-and-schedule UI suite.
retrospective.reason: The notification/toast behavior is PRD-specific UI work and is now covered by deterministic tests; no durable harness rule promotion is needed.
